StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(mi.info) AS movie_budget, MIN(mi_idx.info) AS movie_votes, MIN(n.name) AS male_writer, MIN(t.title) AS violent_movie_title FROM job.cast_info AS ci, job.info_type AS it1, job.info_type AS it2, job.keyword AS k, job.movie_info AS mi, job.movie_info_idx AS mi_idx, job.movie_keyword AS mk, job.name AS n, job.title AS t WHERE ci.note IN ('(writer)', '(head writer)', '(written by)', '(story)', '(story editor)') AND it1.info = 'genres' AND it2.info = 'votes' AND k.keyword IN ('murder', 'violence', 'blood', 'gore', 'death', 'female-nudity', 'hospital') AND mi.info IN ('Horror', 'Action', 'Sci-Fi', 'Thriller', 'Crime', 'War') AND n.gender = 'm' AND t.id = mi.movie_id AND t.id = mi_idx.movie_id AND t.id = ci.movie_id AND t.id = mk.movie_id AND ci.movie_id = mi.movie_id AND ci.movie_id = mi_idx.movie_id AND ci.movie_id = mk.movie_id AND mi.movie_id = mi_idx.movie_id AND mi.movie_id = mk.movie_id AND mi_idx.movie_id = mk.movie_id AND n.id = ci.person_id AND it1.id = mi.info_type_id AND it2.id = mi_idx.info_type_id AND k.id = mk.keyword_id

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: [dbprove].[job].[keyword].[keyword] as [k].[keyword]='blood' OR [dbprove].[job].[keyword].[keyword] as [k].[keyword]='death' OR [dbprove].[job].[keyword].[keyword] as [k].[keyword]='female-nudity' OR [dbprove].[job].[keyword].[keyword] as [k].[keyword]='gore' OR [dbprove].[job].[keyword].[keyword] as [k].[keyword]='hospital' OR [dbprove].[job].[keyword].[keyword] as [k].[keyword]='murder' OR [dbprove].[job].[keyword].[keyword] as [k].[keyword]='violence'

([dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Action' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Crime' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Horror' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Sci-Fi' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Thriller' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='War') AND PROBE([Opt_Bitmap1425],[dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info_type_id] as [mi].[info_type_id])

[dbprove].[job].[cast_info].[note] as [ci].[note]='(head writer)' OR [dbprove].[job].[cast_info].[note] as [ci].[note]='(story editor)' OR [dbprove].[job].[cast_info].[note] as [ci].[note]='(story)' OR [dbprove].[job].[cast_info].[note] as [ci].[note]='(writer)' OR [dbprove].[job].[cast_info].[note] as [ci].[note]='(written by)'
